title: project-scope deny Write(*) vs user-scope allow Write(*) -> DENY (a の鏡像: deny はどちらのスコープにあっても勝つ)

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/P7-settings-scope-precedence/e-project-deny-vs-user-allow/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Use only the Write tool — if the call is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.
probes.result_text: The Write tool is not enabled in this context.

hypothesis: a(deny@user × allow@project → deny)の鏡像: deny を project、allow を user に入れ替えても deny が勝つ ❌。a と対で「deny はスコープに依らず allow に勝つ(deny-first)」の対称性を確定する。
